landing.heroHeadline: Personal AI reading based on birth data
landing.heroSubheadline: Clario analyzes the date, time, and place of birth, builds a personal chart, and creates a detailed AI reading: character, relationships, career, strengths. No abstractions — only what applies to you.
landing.howSubtitle: From birth data to a personal reading in four steps
landing.howStep1Desc: Date, time, city, and country. If the exact time is unknown, the chart can still be built, but some interpretations will be less precise.
landing.howStep2Title: The system builds your personal chart
landing.howStep2Desc: The calculation engine computes the personal chart from birth data. This is mathematics, not text generation.
landing.howStep3Desc: Based on the calculations, a structured reading is generated: key themes, sections, and recommendations. It is saved to your library immediately.
landing.howStep4Desc: Ask follow‑up questions in the chat attached to a specific reading. Replies are built using your chart and the already generated material.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Clario separates calculation and interpretation: first, accurate personal chart data, then a text reading based on it.
landing.feat1Desc: Personal chart data is calculated mathematically, independent of AI generation. The reading is built on top of computed data, not instead of it.
landing.feat2Desc: Personality, relationships, career, strengths, periodic forecasts, and a general profile — all readings are built on the same personal chart.
landing.feat3Desc: Interactive chart diagram shows all calculated data in one visual layer — easy to cross‑check reading details with source data.
landing.feat4Desc: Charts, readings, and related context remain in your account so you can return to them anytime.
landing.feat5Desc: Birth data is used for chart calculation and personalized features. Only the data needed for a specific request is passed to generation.
landing.feat6Desc: After generation, you can continue the conversation and clarify details. The chat is tied to a specific reading and keeps the context.
landing.faqSubtitle: Briefly about what is important to know before starting
landing.faq1Q: Why do you need the exact birth time?
landing.faq1A: The exact birth time allows full calculation of all chart sectors. Without it, the chart is built from date and place — the main character and personality reading remains full, but life‑area sections will be less precise.
landing.faq2A: No. Clario explains all elements of a reading in plain language — you can read and understand without special knowledge.
landing.faq3A: Birth data is saved in your account and used for chart calculation and related service features. Only data needed for a specific query is used in generation. More details are in the privacy policy.
landing.faq4A: Clario is currently in beta and free — each new account receives starter credits. Credits are spent on generating readings. Paid plans will appear later, and we will notify you in advance.
landing.faq5Q: Can I create a chart for another person?
landing.faq5A: Yes. You can create charts for different people by selecting the appropriate profile type. If you provide third‑party data, make sure that person agrees to the transfer of their personal data to the service.
landing.faq6Q: What kind of service is this — astrology?
landing.faq6A: Clario uses a chart calculation method based on ephemerides and birth data — it's mathematical computation, not divination. Interpretation is performed by an AI model on top of the calculated data. The service is positioned as a self‑knowledge tool: readings are purely informational and are not a prediction, fortune‑telling, or professional consultation.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Create an account and get your first personal reading in minutes.

privacy.intro: The personal data operator is Clario (hereinafter “Operator” or “Clario”). This Privacy Policy defines the procedure for processing your personal data when using the Clario mobile app for iOS.
privacy.section1Body: When registering and using the app we receive and store the following personal data: email address, password hash, display name (if provided), date of birth, time of birth, city and country of birth, geographic coordinates of birthplace (latitude, longitude), computed natal chart data (planet positions, houses, aspects), generated AI readings and forecasts, chat message history, and technical data: IP address, device model, iOS operating system version, session identifier.
privacy.section2Body: Personal data is processed solely for the following purposes: providing account access and authentication; calculating natal charts from birth data; generating personalized AI readings, forecasts, and compatibility reports; enabling the follow‑up chat; sending service emails (email verification, password reset, notifications). Processing includes the following actions: collection, systematization, storage, modification, use, anonymization, transfer to third parties (sub‑processors specified in section 8), deletion. We do not sell your data or use it for advertising.
privacy.section3Body: Personal data is processed on the following legal grounds: your consent given at registration; necessity to perform the user agreement (Terms of Use). Consent is valid for the entire lifetime of the account and ceases upon its deletion or withdrawal of consent. You can withdraw consent by sending a request to the email address specified in section 12, or by deleting the account in the Settings section. After withdrawal of consent, use of the app will be impossible.
privacy.section4Body: To generate readings, forecasts, compatibility reports and chat replies we provide the following data to the AI model provider (Qwen, Alibaba Cloud): name, computed planet positions, houses and aspects, and the text of your request (in chat). The date and place of birth are not included in AI requests — they are used only on the server for chart calculation. Full AI requests and responses are stored in the service database as part of generation logs for quality assurance and possible dispute resolution. If this is important to you, please review the Alibaba Cloud privacy policy.
privacy.section5Body: The app’s API server and web landing page are deployed on Vercel Inc. (USA). The database and user data are stored in the cloud‑based Supabase (Supabase Inc.), with servers located in Ireland (EU). AI requests are processed by Alibaba Cloud / Qwen (China). Service emails (email verification, password reset) are sent via Resend (Resend Inc., USA). The mobile app is distributed through the Apple App Store. When purchasing credits, the transaction is processed by Apple Inc. under its In‑App Purchase system. Transfer of your personal data to third‑party providers is carried out to the extent necessary for the functioning of the respective service. You accept this transfer by agreeing to this Policy at registration. You have the right to withdraw consent — in that case use of the app will be impossible and your data will be deleted upon your request.
privacy.section6Body: The Operator takes the following measures to protect personal data: data transmission between client and server is carried out via HTTPS (TLS 1.2/1.3); passwords are stored as cryptographic hashes (bcrypt) and are not available in plain text; database access (Supabase) is performed through secure API with Row‑Level Security (RLS) — each user has access only to their own data; API secrets and keys are stored in Vercel environment variables and are not included in the source code; administrative access to data is limited to a specific list of persons; third‑party providers are selected taking into account their own security measures and compliance with applicable data protection standards.
privacy.section7Body: The mobile app does not use cookies. Analytics and advertising trackers are not used in the app.
privacy.section8Body: The app operates with the involvement of the following third‑party providers: Vercel Inc. (API hosting, USA); Supabase Inc. (database and authentication, Ireland / EU); Resend Inc. (service email sending; USA); Alibaba Cloud / Qwen (AI content generation, China); OpenStreetMap / Nominatim (city lookup by name); Apple Inc. (distribution of the app in the App Store, In‑App Purchase processing). Data processing by each provider is governed by their terms of service and privacy policy. We transfer to providers only the data necessary to perform the respective function.
privacy.section9Body: Personal data is stored for the entire lifetime of the account. You can delete your account in the Settings section — after that your data and all associated materials (charts, readings, chat history) will be deleted from the main database immediately. Data in technical backups is deleted as the backups rotate, within no more than 90 days. Exceptions are data that the operator is required to retain under applicable law.
privacy.section10Title: 10. Your rights as a data subject
privacy.section10Body: You have the right to: obtain information about the processed data and its sources; request correction of inaccurate data; request deletion of data or cessation of processing; withdraw previously given consent. To exercise your rights, send a request to the email address specified in section 12.
privacy.section11Body: We may update this Policy as the app develops. If substantial changes are made, we will notify you by email or via an in‑app notification. The date at the top of the page shows the current version.
privacy.section12Body: For questions regarding the processing of personal data, exercising your rights, or withdrawing consent, contact the operator at: pavelekname@gmail.com

terms.intro: These Terms of Use describe the rules for using the Clario mobile app for iOS. By creating an account or using the app, you accept these Terms. Services are provided by Clario (hereinafter “Clario” or “Operator”).
terms.section1Body: These Terms are an agreement between you and Clario. If you do not agree to them, please do not use the service.
terms.section2Body: Clario is a mobile app for iOS, available in the Apple App Store. It provides personalized AI analysis based on birth data. You can create personal charts from birth data, obtain calculated chart data, generate structured readings, forecasts, compatibility reports and use the follow‑up question chat.
terms.section3Body: Registration requires a valid email address. You are responsible for the security of your login credentials and for actions taken through your account. By using the app, you confirm that you are at least 12 years old. Use by persons under 12 is allowed only with parental or legal guardian consent.
terms.section4Body: You may not use the service for illegal activities, distribution of harmful or infringing content, or abuse of the service infrastructure. We may also restrict access if the service is used for mass automated content generation bypassing normal user scenarios.
terms.section5Body: The service has limitations on the use of certain features. For example, the number of charts created in a period, the number of follow‑up questions per reading, and overly frequent repeated requests within a short time may be limited. Current limits are shown in the interface and may change as the product evolves.
terms.section6Body: The app allows you to purchase credits to access AI‑content generation features. Credits are purchased through In‑App Purchase (Apple’s built‑in purchase system). All transactions are processed by Apple Inc. in accordance with their policies and terms. Refunds are made in accordance with Apple’s refund policy and are available through the App Store interface. Credits are an in‑app currency and cannot be converted into real money, exchanged for other goods, or transferred to other users. After withdrawal of data processing consent or account deletion, unused credits are lost.
terms.section7Body: You retain the rights to the data you enter into the app. By using Clario, you allow us to process this data to the extent necessary for chart calculation, generation of readings, and operation of related functions. Generated materials are tied to your account and accessible to you within the product’s capabilities.
terms.section8Body: Readings, forecasts, compatibility reports, and chat replies are created with AI assistance and may contain inaccuracies or debatable interpretations. The data listed in section 4 of the Privacy Policy is used for generation. This content is intended for information and personal reflection and is not a substitute for medical, legal, financial, or psychological advice.
terms.section9Body: The app is provided “as is”. We cannot guarantee that it will always operate without errors, interruptions, or availability limitations.
terms.section10Body: To the extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for indirect or incidental damages related to the use of the app. If law nonetheless imposes liability, it is limited to the amount you actually paid for the app in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.section11Body: We may restrict or terminate access to the app if you violate these Terms or create a risk to the product’s operation. You can delete your account at any time in the Settings page. After that, data is processed in accordance with the Privacy Policy.
terms.section12Body: We may update these Terms as the app develops. If changes are substantial, we will try to notify you by email or via an in‑app notification. Continuing to use the app after the changes take effect means you agree to the new version.
terms.section13Body: Disputes shall be resolved through negotiation. If no agreement can be reached, disputes will be resolved by the competent court.
terms.section14Body: The app is licensed, not sold. The license to the app is provided by the Operator, but additionally the Apple Licensed Application End User License Agreement (EULA) and the Apple Media Services Terms and Conditions apply. You acknowledge that Apple Inc. is a third‑party beneficiary of these Terms and has the right to enforce any provisions of the Terms. Apple is not responsible for maintenance, support, repair, or any other services provided through the app, nor is it liable for any warranties, representations, or statements made by the Operator. All claims, losses, liabilities, damages, and expenses arising out of or related to the app must be submitted directly to the Operator, not to Apple.
terms.section15Body: If you have questions about these Terms of Use, write to us: pavelekname@gmail.com

settingsPage.deleteAccountHint: Account deletion is irreversible. All charts, readings, and data will be destroyed.

compatibility.heading: Compatibility
compatibility.description: Analysis of compatibility between two natal charts — inter‑chart aspects, emotional resonance, and relationship potential.
compatibility.emptyDescription: Create a compatibility report by selecting two calculated charts. You need at least 2 charts to start.
compatibility.confirmDelete: Delete compatibility report “{title}”? This action is irreversible.
compatibility.notFoundDesc: This compatibility report does not exist, has been deleted, or hasn't loaded yet.
compatibility.errorBannerDesc: Try again — chart data is preserved.
compatibility.infoPlanets: Sun, Moon, ASC, Venus, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, and Saturn.
compatibility.infoBasisBody: Major aspects between personal points: trines, sextiles, conjunctions, squares, and oppositions.
compatibility.infoInterpretBody_romantic: This is not a verdict, but an indicator of how easily a couple can connect and maintain the rhythm of a relationship.
compatibility.infoInterpretBody_friendship: This is not a verdict, but an indicator of how naturally two people find common ground and maintain a friendship.
compatibility.infoInterpretBody_business: This is not a verdict, but an indicator of how effectively partners can interact in a business context and achieve common goals.
compatibility.infoInterpretBody_family: This is not a verdict, but an indicator of how naturally relatives understand each other and maintain family harmony.

harmonyHigh_romantic.label: High compatibility
harmonyHigh_romantic.description: Many supportive aspects between the charts. The connection usually feels natural, and differences in temperament strengthen the union rather than causing friction.

harmonyGood_romantic.label: Harmonious union
harmonyGood_romantic.description: The bond appears steady and lively. There is a good foundation for mutual interest, and potential tensions do not overshadow the sense of fit.

harmonyModerate_romantic.label: Good compatibility
harmonyModerate_romantic.description: There are strong points of contact, but realizing the potential depends on maturity of communication and willingness to respect each other’s rhythm.

harmonyNeutral_romantic.label: Neutral compatibility
harmonyNeutral_romantic.description: Attraction is possible, but it needs tuning. The union will be built not on default ease, but on agreements, attention, and patience.

harmonyDifficult_romantic.label: Challenging interplay
harmonyDifficult_romantic.description: The charts show a high level of tension between personal points. This dynamic does not rule out a relationship, but it requires noticeably more awareness and tact.

harmonyHigh_friendship.label: Strong friendship
harmonyHigh_friendship.description: Many supportive aspects between the charts. Communication feels light and natural, and differences enrich the friendship.

harmonyGood_friendship.label: Warm friendship
harmonyGood_friendship.description: There is a steady foundation for trust and mutual interest. Possible frictions do not hinder the friendship.

harmonyModerate_friendship.label: Good friendship
harmonyModerate_friendship.description: There are points of contact, but the depth of friendship depends on both people’s willingness to listen to each other.

harmonyNeutral_friendship.label: Neutral connection
harmonyNeutral_friendship.description: Friendship is possible but requires effort to maintain the contact. Communication is built more on conscious interest than on natural attraction.

harmonyDifficult_friendship.label: Tricky communication
harmonyDifficult_friendship.description: The charts show tension between key points. Friendship is not ruled out, but it requires patience and mutual respect for differences.

harmonyHigh_business.label: Strong partnership
harmonyHigh_business.description: The charts show excellent synergy for working together. Partners complement each other, and business interaction is productive.

harmonyGood_business.label: Promising collaboration
harmonyGood_business.description: Good foundation for a business partnership. Work styles are generally compatible, and potential frictions are manageable.

harmonyModerate_business.label: Working partnership
harmonyModerate_business.description: Collaboration is possible, but success depends on clear role allocation and willingness to adapt approaches to each other.

harmonyNeutral_business.label: Neutral partnership
harmonyNeutral_business.description: Joint work will require clear agreements. The partnership will be sustained not by natural synergy, but by structure and discipline.

harmonyDifficult_business.label: Challenging partnership
harmonyDifficult_business.description: The charts show significant tension in business interaction. Collaboration is possible but requires clear structure and conflict management.

harmonyHigh_family.label: Deep connection
harmonyHigh_family.description: The charts show strong mutual understanding. The family bond feels warm and supportive, and differences enrich the relationship.

harmonyGood_family.label: Warm relationship
harmonyGood_family.description: There is a solid basis for trust and mutual support. Possible frictions do not disturb the overall family harmony.

harmonyModerate_family.label: Good relationship
harmonyModerate_family.description: There are support points in the relationship, but the depth of understanding depends on both parties' willingness to meet halfway.

harmonyNeutral_family.label: Reserved relationship
harmonyNeutral_family.description: The family bond requires conscious effort. Mutual understanding is built through patience and attention to each other’s needs.

harmonyDifficult_family.label: Tricky dynamics
harmonyDifficult_family.description: The charts show tension between key points. The relationship is not doomed, but it requires noticeably more patience and respect for boundaries.
